hero.body: [ro] Pick a framework. Configure. Launch in 60 seconds. No code required, no infrastructure to manage. 4 frameworks, 20+ platforms, free tier with BYOK.

agentDiscovery.heading: [ro] Command an army of subagents
agentDiscovery.body: [ro] Your local coding agent becomes a fleet commander. Paste this prompt — it registers on Hatcher in your name, spins up always-on subagents (Telegram bots, research loops, Discord mods, monitors), and keeps controlling them long after your session ends.
agentDiscovery.step01: [ro] Send this prompt to your AI coding agent — Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Hermes, or any agent that can fetch URLs and run shell commands.
agentDiscovery.step02: [ro] Agent registers an account with your email and sends you a verification link.
agentDiscovery.step03: [ro] Click verify. Your agent picks a template, deploys, and hands you a running AI.

howItWorks.heading: [ro] 3 steps. 60 seconds.
howItWorks.subheading: [ro] No coding, no setup guides, no configuration files.

steps.title: [ro] Pick a framework
steps.desc: [ro] OpenClaw, Hermes, ElizaOS, or Milady. Each has unique strengths — browser control, memory, multi-agent, on-chain.

steps.title: [ro] Configure
steps.desc: [ro] Name, personality, integrations. Fill a simple form — no config files, no YAML.

steps.title: [ro] Deploy
steps.desc: [ro] One click. Your agent is live on every connected platform in under 60 seconds.

pricing.heading: [ro] Start free, grow when ready
pricing.subheading: [ro] All platforms included on every plan. Bring your own AI key for unlimited messages on any tier.
pricing.addonsNote: [ro] Need more agents, messages, or storage? Add stackable packs — all tiers get add-on flexibility.

founding.heading: [ro] Pay once, keep forever.
founding.subheading: [ro] Locked-in price, no monthly fees, all Business-tier features forever. Only 20 spots.
founding.allTaken: [ro] All {max} founding spots are taken. Standard tiers still available.

items.a: [ro] Yes. The free plan gives you 1 agent, 20 messages per day, and access to all platforms. No credit card required. BYOK (bring your own LLM key) = unlimited messages on any tier.

items.q: [ro] Do I need to know how to code?
items.a: [ro] Not at all! Creating an agent is like filling out a form — choose a name, describe what you want it to do, pick platforms, and launch.
[ro] Connect your own OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or Groq key for unlimited messages. You only pay your AI provider directly.
[ro] On our cloud servers 24/7. No need to keep your computer on or install anything.

finalCta.heading: [ro] Ready to deploy your first agent?
finalCta.body: [ro] Free tier includes 1 agent with 20 messages/day. BYOK = unlimited. No credit card required.

addons.heading: [ro] Add-ons
addons.subheading: [ro] Customize your plan. Stack add-ons on any tier. Mix and match as needed.

integrations.heading: [ro] All Integrations Free
integrations.body: [ro] Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, Slack, Signal, iMessage, and 14+ more platforms are included free on all tiers. No extra charge, ever.
integrations.note: [ro] All prices in USD, payable in SOL or $HATCHER. BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) = unlimited messages with your own LLM API key on any tier.

compareTable.heading: [ro] Compare Plans
compareTable.subheading: [ro] See what each tier includes at a glance

items.q: [ro] What is BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)?
items.a: [ro] BYOK lets you use your own API key for any LLM provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, Groq, OpenRouter). This is always free on all tiers -- you pay the provider directly, no Hatcher markup. Messages with your own key are unlimited.
[ro] Add-ons are stackable on any tier. For example, if you are on the Starter tier (1 agent) and purchase a +3 Agents add-on, you can run 4 agents total. You can stack multiple add-ons.

items.q: [ro] What is the difference between shared and dedicated resources?
items.a: [ro] Shared resources mean your agent shares CPU and RAM with others on the same server -- still performant but may vary under load. Dedicated resources (Pro and Business) give your agent guaranteed CPU and RAM that no one else can use.
[ro] You can pay with SOL or $HATCHER. Prices are listed in USD and converted at live rates via Jupiter.
[ro] Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time and your tier will revert to Free at the end of the billing period. Agents beyond your free limit will be paused.

[ro] Free agents sleep after 1 hour of inactivity, Starter after 4 hours, Pro after 12 hours. Business and Founding Member agents are always-on with no auto-sleep. They wake instantly on the next message. You can add Always On to any agent for $7.99/mo.

items.q: [ro] What LLM do I get with the free tier?
items.a: [ro] Free and Starter tiers use GPT-OSS 20B on Groq. Pro, Business, and Founding Member tiers get Llama 3.3 70B on Groq — a more capable model. Message limits are account-wide: Free 20/day, Starter 50/day, Pro 100/day, Business 300/day, Founding 300/day. BYOK (bring your own LLM key) bypasses all limits on any tier.

items.q: [ro] What is the Founding Member tier?
items.a: [ro] Founding Member is a one-time $99 payment that gives you lifetime access to Hatcher: 10 agents, 300 messages/day, 4 GB RAM, 2 GB workspace, always-on, and all premium features (File Manager, Full Logs, priority support) included. No monthly fees, ever. Limited to 20 spots — once they are gone, this tier is gone.

cta.heading: [ro] Ready to deploy your agent?
cta.body: [ro] Pick your framework, choose a template, and deploy in seconds. Start free with a built-in LLM. Upgrade when you need more power.

pricing.footerNote: [ro] All prices in USD, payable in SOL or $HATCHER. BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) = unlimited messages with your own LLM API key on any tier.

frameworks.heading: [ro] Pick the right framework
frameworks.subheading: [ro] Hatcher supports 4 battle-tested agent frameworks. Each has unique strengths — here's how to choose.
frameworks.bestForSubheading: [ro] Not sure which framework to pick? Match your use case.
frameworks.benchmarksSubheading: [ro] Cold-start time and baseline memory usage on Hatcher shared infrastructure. Actual values vary by config.
frameworks.benchmarkCallout: [ro] 🌸 Milady is the fastest and lightest — ideal for free-tier deployments. 🦞 OpenClaw packs the most tools but needs more resources.
frameworks.configSubheading: [ro] Each framework has its own config format. Here's what a typical setup looks like.
frameworks.llmSubheading: [ro] All frameworks support BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) for unlimited messages. On the hosted LLM, every tier runs Llama 4 Scout (17B) on Groq — tool-call reliability and latency are the same across Free, Starter, Pro, Business, and Founding Member. Only the daily message quota changes per tier.
frameworks.byokNote: [ro] * BYOK always free — unlimited messages on any framework.
frameworks.readySubheading: [ro] Pick a framework, configure your agent, and go live in under 60 seconds. Free tier included.

affiliate.heading: [ro] Earn from every user you bring to Hatcher.
affiliate.subheading: [ro] Up to 40% recurring commissions on every paid user you refer. Cash in your wallet, credits to fund your own agents, or a hybrid split — your call. Attribution is link-based and sticks for the lifetime of the referred account.
affiliate.threeWaysSubheading: [ro] Same eligible revenue, different split. Pick the mode that matches how you want value out of the program — you can switch later by contacting support.
affiliate.foundingBonusHeading: [ro] Refer a Founding Member → flat $20 cash bonus.
affiliate.foundingBonusBody: [ro] The $99 lifetime tier pays a one-time flat $20 to the referring affiliate — in addition to anything they earn from that user's later addon or agent purchases. Paid in cash regardless of your default payout mode.
affiliate.readyBody: [ro] Applications take a few minutes. Approvals in 3–5 days. Recurring commissions for the lifetime of every user you bring in.
